description: Devin.AI V3 API integration — delegate tasks, manage sessions, review and remediate PRs, research codebases via DeepWiki, orchestrate plan-implement-review chains

devin_service_user_token.title: Devin service user token
devin_service_user_token.description: Devin V3 service user token (cog_ prefix). Create at Devin Enterprise Settings > Service Users. Stored in system keychain.

devin_org_id.title: Devin organization ID
devin_org_id.description: Devin organization ID. Find at Devin Enterprise Settings > Organizations.
